snippet: Switch or start your career in tech with 50% off Pro. FLASH SALE 50% off No matter where you are in your journey, Codecademy Pro can help you switch or start your career in tech. Get exclusive access
subject: FLASH SALE: 50% off Pro
body:
Switch or start your career in tech with 50% off Pro. 







 FLASH SALE 


50% off


 No matter where you are in your journey, Codecademy Pro can help you switch 
or start your career in tech. Get exclusive access to 700+ interactive courses, 
real-world projects, industry certification prep, and so much more — all for 
50% off.

Join Pro  
<https://www.codecademy.com/checkout?plan_id=proGoldAnnualV2&discountCode=MAYTHECODE&plan_type=pro>



Why join Pro?



 
<https://www.codecademy.com/checkout?plan_id=proGoldAnnualV2&discountCode=MAYTHECODE&plan_type=pro>

Step-by-step guidance


Gain the skills you need to land the job you want with career paths in data 
science, full-stack development, and more.

 
<https://www.codecademy.com/checkout?plan_id=proGoldAnnualV2&discountCode=MAYTHECODE&plan_type=pro>

Hands-on, interactive learning


Unlock a personalized learning roadmap as you build real, working prototypes 
with the AI Builder.



 
<https://www.codecademy.com/checkout?plan_id=proGoldAnnualV2&discountCode=MAYTHECODE&plan_type=pro>

Professional certifications


Prove your proficiency and show prospective employers you’ve got what it takes.

 
<https://www.codecademy.com/checkout?plan_id=proGoldAnnualV2&discountCode=MAYTHECODE&plan_type=pro>

Portfolio projects


Apply what you're learning to create robust, recruiter-ready projects for your 
portfolio.




Develop the skills and experience to build your career in tech with Pro

Join Pro now  
<https://www.codecademy.com/checkout?plan_id=proGoldAnnualV2&discountCode=MAYTHECODE&plan_type=pro>



*50% Off offer valid from May 4, 2026 at 12:00:00 am Eastern Time ("ET") and 
ends at 11:59:59 pm ET on May 7, 2026. Discount is only applicable to new 
annual subscription plans (excluding Codecademy Plus, Student, Teams, and All 
Access), and cannot be combined with any other offer. Discount applies to the 
first year of a new subscription, after which the subscription will auto-renew 
for subsequent years at the regular price. Code valid one time only. Discount 
applies to certain products and not all products are available in all 
countries. Discount is not applicable to taxes. Codecademy reserves the right 
to modify or cancel this promotion at any time without notice. Any subscription 
plan purchases are subject to Codecademy'sTerms of Service 
<https://www.codecademy.com/terms?utm_source=iterable&utm_medium=email>.
